scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names api,web,app --prefix-colors cyan,magenta,green "cross-env PORT=8080 npm --prefix .. run dev:api" "cross-env WEB_PORT=3000 npm --prefix ../artifacts/jarvis run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 3000" "cross-env WEB_PORT=3000 wait-on tcp:8080 && electron ."
scripts.package:win: npm run build:api && npm run build:web && electron-builder --win nsis
scripts.package:mac: npm run build:api && npm run build:web && electron-builder --mac dmg
scripts.package:linux: npm run build:api && npm run build:web && electron-builder --linux AppImage
